# Canva

Bring your Canva design workflow into Claude. This plugin connects to Canva's MCP server to let you create, edit, review, resize, and brand-check designs through natural conversation. It includes six specialized skills: edit existing designs with a safe transaction-based protocol, resize designs for Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn in one step, bulk-create designs from spreadsheet data using brand templates, run brand-kit compliance checks for colors, fonts, and logo usage, get structured design feedback on visual hierarchy and accessibility, and automatically implement comment feedback on your designs.

All edits go through a preview-and-approve flow before being committed, so you stay in control. The brand-check skill audits designs across five dimensions — color palette, typography, logo treatment, copy tone, and overall consistency — and flags issues as on-brand, off-brand, or unverifiable. The resize skill handles all major social platforms in parallel with exact pixel specifications.

**How to use:** Once installed, just describe what you want in plain language. Try prompts like `Check this Canva design against my brand kit`, `Resize design DABcd1234ef for all social media platforms`, `Bulk create designs from this spreadsheet using my brand template`, `Edit the headline text in my Canva design`, or `Give me feedback on this design's visual hierarchy`. You can also ask it to read comment threads on a design and apply the suggested changes automatically.

Requires connecting to the Canva MCP server. The bulk-create skill requires a Canva Enterprise plan.
